hero.sub:
You're not just visiting. You're becoming local.
Every challenge, every meet, every spot - earn your place in this city.
hero.orPreview: Or take a look in your browser — no install

join.pickCity:
Pick a city
and jump in
join.authHint: Save your name · unlock profiles · add friends

local.title: Be the local that runs the city
local.tagline: You know the spots. Challenge the locals or the travelers to find them.
bullets: Challenge locals or travelers - food, place, culture or help
Pull people to the spots you love

exploring.title: Take on local challenges anywhere
exploring.tagline: Wherever you land, take on what locals built.
bullets: Take on challenges launched by locals
Find the real spots, recommended by people who live there
Live the city like a local, not like a tourist

how.title: Three steps to meet people in person.

steps.title: Pick your side
steps.desc:
Local. You know the city.
Traveler. You want to live it.

steps.title: Launch or join a challenge
steps.desc: Anyone launches a meet — a date + a place — or a photo contest with a deadline. It's open to a whole group, not 1-on-1.

steps.title: Show up together
steps.desc: Everyone who joins meets in person — or sends their best photo before the deadline. The host validates who came, or picks the winner.

concept.title:
Not another social network.
A reason to meet in person.
rules: No followers. No feeds. No algorithms.
Gather a group around a real meet, or run a photo contest. Whoever shows up — or wins — earns it.
Real people. Real places. Right now.

seo: Hilads is a real-time social app where people gather around real-world challenges — group meets at a set time and place, and photo contests across cities. Join a challenge in Paris, host a meet in Barcelona, or launch a photo contest from Lisbon. No account needed. Just show up.

download.title: Your city in your pocket.
download.sub: Get the full experience: push notifications, faster, made for your city.

repeat.titleGeneric: Your city is live right now.

international.tagline: Send a challenge across cities. Get a video back.
international.sub: When your city is quiet, the world isn't. Challenge someone anywhere - they send proof, you validate from afar.
bullets: Target a specific city, or leave it open to anyone, anywhere.
They submit a geotagged photo - proof it happened.
You validate from your couch. Reject with a reason if it's off.

how.title: Meet people in person, in 3 steps.
how.step1: Pick your side — local or traveler

concept.line4: A reason to meet in person.

stories.storePrompt: Prefer the app? Get notifications and the full experience.
